changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_devices ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, token VARCHAR(1024) NOT NULL, platform VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ANDROID', is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, last_seen_at TIMESTAMPTZ, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE user_devices IS 'FCM device tokens registered per user — used for push notification delivery'; COMMENT ON COLUMN user_devices.platform IS 'ANDROID | IOS | WEB'; COMMENT ON COLUMN user_devices.is_active IS 'FALSE when token is revoked or device unregistered';
